title: Inter-Departmental Sports Meet '26
description: The annual sports tournament of GEC Palakkad showcasing talent in football, cricket, basketball, and athletics.

title: Dyuthi '26 Arts Festival (On-Stage Items)
description: The major cultural extravaganza featuring stage performance events, music, drama, dance, and art contests.

title: Hack-GEC: 24-Hour National Hackathon
body: A 24-hour non-stop coding hackathon organized by the College Union in association with coding club. Mentors from top tech companies are participating. Team selection is complete, and the main competition is happening right now in the Central Library Hub.
description: 24-hour national hackathon for student developers seeking to build innovative tech prototypes under hardware/software themes.

title: KTU TechFest Workshop Series
description: Pre-techfest hands-on workshops in IoT, Embedded Systems, and Web Application Security conducted by industry experts.

title: World Environment Day Tree Plantation
description: Eco-union initiative to plant 100 saplings around the campus boundary in association with NSS GEC Palakkad.
